items.label: Saveable operator checklist framing
items.uncertainty_note: No live trend research was fetched in R16; this is a deterministic planning assumption based on the source asset shape.
items.rationale: The content already behaves like a reusable workflow, so a checklist framing is a plausible save-oriented wrapper.

items.label: Single-source multi-surface rewrite packages
items.uncertainty_note: This is a planning assumption about packaging behavior, not a verified current-market trend claim.
items.rationale: The operator goal explicitly aims to reuse one asset across multiple platforms, so a rewrite-package angle is a stable working assumption.

items.label: Evidence-first practical explainers
items.uncertainty_note: This remains an assumption-labeled execution angle until a future pass intentionally adds fresh external research.
items.rationale: The source asset is educational and constraint-heavy, so an evidence-first explainer angle is the safest deterministic trend assumption.
